enchantment.defenders.footwork.desc: Reduces the movement penalty while blocking by 10% per level.
enchantment.defenders.reprisal.desc: After a perfect parry, your next melee attack within 2 secs deals +1 damage per level.
enchantment.defenders.finesse.desc: Adds +0.5 melee damage per level while this Defender is equipped off hand.
enchantment.defenders.reflexes.desc: Extends the perfect-parry window by 0.1 secs per level.
enchantment.defenders.deflection.desc: Reduce all damage 10% per level (+5% for melee).
enchantment.defenders.sixth_sense.desc: Has a 10% chance to auto-parry melee attacks and makes attackers glow for 5 secs on any parry.
